channel.title: ransomware on Jocelyn Khuu
channel.description: Recent content in ransomware on Jocelyn Khuu

item.title: Panic Buying Gas?
item.description: Gas prices are still steadily increasing as Colonial Pipeline recovers from the ransomware attack that hit earlier this month. The FBI has confirmed that the pipeline was compromised by DarkSide, a ransomware operation that states that they only target companies that can pay the specified ransom as they do not “want to kill your business” What’s also nice of them is that they have a list of “principles” where they won’t attack hospitals, schools, non-profit orgs and the government (but who knows how true this is).
